_comment: Example configuration - Run 'python setup.py' for interactive setup, or copy this file to config.json and customize
_rekordbox_xml_path_doc: Optional. Absolute path to the Rekordbox XML file processed tracks should be appended to. Configure the same path in Rekordbox > Preferences > Advanced > rekordbox xml > Imported Library. Leave unset to disable sync.
_external_watch_doc: External drive watcher: registers new audio files appearing on an external drive in the same Rekordbox XML. First scan baselines existing files without registering them — only files that appear AFTER the baseline are registered.
_ssd_archive_doc: Optional. When set AND the volume is mounted, processed tracks are moved here from local_path. Path must live under /Volumes/<drive>/... so liveness can be checked. When the SSD is unplugged, tracks stay in local_path automatically.
